HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

19
20#include <fstream>
21#include <iostream>
22#include <sstream>
23#include <string>
24
25// Only include this once during compiling
26#ifndef IOFUNCTIONS_H
27#define IOFUNCTIONS_H
28
30
53template <class T>
54int ReadCommented(std::ifstream *inStream, T *target) {
55 std::string strRead;
56 std::stringstream strStream(std::stringstream::in);
57
58 while ((*inStream)) {
59 *inStream >> strRead;
60 if (strRead[0] == '#') {
61 std::getline(*inStream, strRead);
62 } else if ((*inStream)) {
63 strStream.str(strRead);
64 if (!(strStream >> *target))
65 return 1;
66 else
67 return 0;
68 }
69 }
70 return 1;
71}
72
74
85template <class T>
86int ReadCommentedG(std::ifstream *inStream, T *target) {
87 std::string strRead;
88 std::stringstream strStream(std::stringstream::in);
89
90 while ((*inStream)) {
91 *inStream >> strRead;
92 if (strRead[0] == '$') {
93 std::getline(*inStream, strRead);
94 } else if ((*inStream)) {
95 strStream.str(strRead);
96 if (!(strStream >> *target))
97 return 1;
98 else
99 return 0;
100 }
101 }
102 return 1;
103}
104
106
117template <class T>
118int ReadAndPrint(std::ifstream *inStream) {
119 T tTmp;
120 if (ReadCommented<T>(inStream, &tTmp) != 0)
121 std::cout << "Error!" << std::endl;
122 else
123 std::cout << tTmp << std::endl;
124 return 0;
125}
126
127#endif
